evidence.exact_quote: I am the Director of Field Operations for Houston Pipe Line Company and request your support on a simple, yet important matter.
As currently planned, the employees of Houston Pipe Line will transfer to  American Electric Power effective June1.
My request is for a simple thank you from you to our employees for the work that they have done for Enron.

Our field employees look forward to this change with the mixed emotions of new opportunities and challenges but equally with the pride that HPL was one of the original building blocks of the great company that Enron has become today.

As arguably the most identifiable international corporate leader in Houston and as the Chairman of the 1990 Economic Summit and the 1992 Republican National Convention, both of which you left with a positive surplus (very important to the Olympics), you are in an excellent position to discuss Houston's international status.

George DeMontrond, Susan Bandy (the Houston 2012 Exec Director) and I would very much appreciate 15 minutes or so of your time to update you on Houston's bid efforts and discuss your potential participation in the upcoming site visit.

I want to thank you for taking time out of your busy schedule to help me
I really admire Enron as a company
I look forward to assisting you and Enron where ever you need help.
